factory_decisions.context: AC-DB-1 requires a Shift Alerts section. The shift_alerts table exists in the schema but cascade_task_dates() does not yet write to it (documented factory_question from foundation cycle).
alternatives_considered: Skip the section entirely — violates AC-DB-1 three-section requirement
Compute alerts client-side by diffing task dates — unreliable without a baseline, adds client JS
Write a migration to add a trigger on task date updates — expands scope beyond this story
factory_decisions.rationale: Wiring the UI to the real shift_alerts table now means the section will auto-populate when the shift-alerts story adds the cascade writer. Empty state is graceful. No throwaway code.

factory_decisions.decision: Search Before Building audit for task-quick-actions story
factory_decisions.context: Pre-implementation code reuse analysis
factory_decisions.rationale: Found: 1 BUILD (toggleTaskComplete server action + computeToggleResult pure fn + BriefingTaskList client component), 2 EXTEND (selectTodayTasks to include complete tasks, briefing page to use client component), 3 REUSE (logTaskDelay action, RefreshButton useTransition+router.refresh pattern, warm earth-tone design tokens). Key reuse: existing router.refresh() pattern from RefreshButton for AC-QA-4 in-place updates.

factory_decisions.decision: selectTodayTasks includes complete tasks for undo support
factory_decisions.context: AC-QA-2 requires undoing completion from the briefing. If complete tasks were filtered out (original AC-DB-2 behavior), toggling a task would make it disappear immediately.
alternatives_considered: Keep original filter (exclude complete) and re-fetch on toggle — task disappears during the round trip, confusing UX
Client-side local filter override — diverges from server truth, breaks on page refresh
Include complete tasks sorted after incomplete (chosen) — task stays visible with strikethrough, user can undo
factory_decisions.rationale: Including complete tasks with a sort bias (incomplete first) preserves the undo flow while keeping active work prominent. The empty-state message still shows correctly when ALL tasks are out of range. This is a minor behavioral change logged as a divergence for the evaluator.

factory_decisions.decision: Quick actions link to /tasks/:id with hash anchors rather than inline modals
factory_decisions.context: AC-QA-3 specifies Log Delay, Add Note, View Detail as quick actions. Log Delay already exists on /tasks/:id as TaskDelayLogger. Add Note needs a notes-editing UI that does not yet exist.
alternatives_considered: Inline modal per quick action on /briefing — duplicates TaskDelayLogger and creates a new notes editor; bloats briefing client JS
Navigate to /tasks/:id (chosen) — reuses existing per-task controls, keeps briefing lightweight
Bottom sheet on mobile — custom animation + portal complexity for what is a simple navigation
factory_decisions.rationale: Link to /tasks/:id (with #delay and #notes hash anchors) reuses the existing delay logger on the detail page and avoids building a duplicate. The Add Note action links to #notes which will activate when a notes-editing section is added to the task detail in a future story. View Detail is a plain navigation. Keeps the briefing page focused on its primary role (status overview) rather than becoming a full task-editing surface.

factory_decisions.decision: Swipe gesture uses 60px threshold with native touchStart/touchEnd tracking
factory_decisions.context: AC-QA-3 requires swipe left on mobile to reveal quick actions. Options: CSS-only with scroll-snap, JS touch tracking, or a gesture library.
alternatives_considered: Install a gesture library (react-swipeable, use-gesture) — adds a dependency for one component
CSS scroll-snap with overflow-x — limited control over snap points, hard to wire dismiss behavior
Native touch tracking with 60px threshold (chosen) — zero dependencies, full control over swipe/dismiss
factory_decisions.rationale: 60px threshold is comfortable for intentional swipes on mobile (avoids false positives from scroll jitter). touchStartX ref tracks per-task independently so multiple rows can be swiped. Swiping right or tapping outside dismisses. CSS translateX transition provides smooth slide animation. No third-party dependency for a single interaction pattern.

factory_questions.question: AI Assist chat currently uses a keyword-matched suggester stub. A follow-up story should add a real LLM backend (Claude via Anthropic SDK or OpenAI) behind the existing suggestFromMessage(message, snapshot) interface. Need: decision on model (Claude Haiku for cost vs Sonnet for quality), ANTHROPIC_API_KEY provisioning in Vercel env vars, server-action wrapper with streaming, and a structured-output prompt that returns the AssistantSuggestion shape (title, rationale, changes[]).
factory_questions.resolved_as: Stubbed with deterministic ICF/insulation/solar rules for this cycle; swap to real LLM in a dedicated llm-integration story

factory_questions.question: Broken-dependency warning (AC-TC-2) is currently dormant because template-apply does not write task_dependencies rows. The task-management cycle needs to let users author dependencies between tasks before this UI flag will actually fire. UI + logic + tests are already wired correctly.
factory_questions.resolved_as: Dormant warning — activates automatically once task_dependencies rows exist for the project

factory_questions.question: Supabase Auth email confirmation: Vercel production URL must be added to Supabase allowed redirect URLs before signup emails will work.

cascade_task_dates() does not currently write to shift_alerts. The cascade function updates task dates and material order_by_dates but does not log the changes to shift_alerts. This must be added when implementing the daily-briefing feature area.
factory_questions.resolved_as: Deferred to daily-briefing feature cycle (shift-alerts story)

factory_questions.question: Duration-edit cascade (AC-TM-5) is exercised via cascade_task_dates() RPC — the pure date math is unit-tested but the SQL function itself is not hit from Node tests. A Supabase integration smoke test (seed a 3-task dep chain, bump the middle one's duration, assert downstream dates shifted) would close the loop.
factory_questions.resolved_as: Unit tests cover the pure layer; QA phase should verify the RPC cascade against the live DB

factory_questions.question: Task edit UI only surfaces duration_days. Name, notes, trade, and depends_on editing for EXISTING tasks is out of scope for task-management (the spec only calls out duration edits in AC-TM-5) — those edits will want a dedicated /tasks/:id edit screen in a later story.
factory_questions.resolved_as: Deferred — current scope is create + duration-edit + delete. A future task-edit story can extend StageTasksManager or use the /tasks/:id route.

factory_questions.question: Trade edit allows editing every field (name, specialty, phone, email, notes) but AC-TR-1 only specifies the create contract. Editing is implied by J2-briefing ('call the trade') but not explicitly required. If editing is ever restricted (e.g. locking name once assigned), the UI in TradesManager needs to react.
factory_questions.found_in: AC-TR-1 vs the broader trade-management implied by AC-TR-2/3/4
factory_questions.resolved_as: Full CRUD shipped — matching user expectations for a contacts list. Can be narrowed later if a concrete edit-restriction requirement surfaces.

factory_questions.question: /materials index page (app/(app)/materials/page.tsx) is still the seeded placeholder with pulse skeletons. No AC in material-line-items specifies its content. A follow-up story should define whether it's an ordering queue, a delivery schedule, or an inventory dashboard.
factory_questions.found_in: spec — affected_screens includes /materials but no AC covers it
factory_questions.resolved_as: Deferred — left as placeholder; this story only ships the per-task materials UI on /tasks/:id per AC-ML-1 wording

factory_questions.question: Currency for estimated_cost is hard-coded to EUR in formatCurrency. No project-level currency field exists in the projects schema; vision.json doesn't specify a currency.
factory_questions.resolved_as: Hard-coded EUR for now, matching the Irish construction context from seed_spec/brainstorming. A future story should add projects.currency and thread it through Material displays.

factory_questions.question: AC-DL-4 offline delay-logging: service worker is registered but has no offline action queue. A future story should add IndexedDB-backed mutation replay (Background Sync API) so delays logged offline sync when connectivity returns with the 'Delay synced' toast. Current implementation uses a Server Action over fetch — it will fail visibly with an inline error message when offline rather than queueing.
factory_questions.resolved_as: Deferred — logged inline error on offline for now; documented as env_limitation

factory_questions.question: Log Delay entry point on /briefing (AC-DL-1 says '/tasks/:id or /briefing'): satisfied by the /tasks/:id path for this story. /briefing still shows Upcoming Orders only — when the briefing page grows a Today's Tasks section it should link to the per-task delay picker (or embed one inline).
factory_questions.resolved_as: Deferred — OR satisfied by /tasks/:id. /briefing Log Delay button queued for a daily-briefing follow-up story.

factory_questions.question: Native pull-to-refresh gesture (AC-DB-5 mobile) not implemented — Refresh button covers the data reload. Should a touch-gesture pull-to-refresh be added in a follow-up story?
factory_questions.resolved_as: Satisfied via Refresh button on both mobile and desktop. Native gesture deferred — requires touch event handling or a third-party library.

factory_questions.question: Add Note quick action (AC-QA-3) links to /tasks/:id#notes but no notes editing section exists on the task detail page yet. The task model has a notes field and createTask accepts notes, but there is no inline edit-notes UI on /tasks/:id. A future story should add an editable notes section.
factory_questions.resolved_as: Link to /tasks/:id#notes — the notes editing section will be added in a future task-edit story. The quick action is functional as navigation.

FINDING (non-blocking): lib/supabase/types.ts was not regenerated after the templates migration (20260405194448_add_templates_table.sql). The templates table is absent from the Database type. Feature builders querying templates via the typed Supabase client will need 'as any' casts. types/database.ts is authoritative and correct.

FINDING (non-blocking): lib/supabase/types.ts has materials.quantity typed as 'number | null' but the SQL schema defines it as TEXT. types/database.ts correctly types it as 'string | null'. Feature code should import from types/database.ts.

FINDING (non-blocking): Storage RLS policies check auth.uid() IS NOT NULL only — not project ownership. Any authenticated user with a direct storage path can read/delete another user's files. The signed URL pattern (60s expiry) and application-layer path construction provide practical protection, but this is weaker than the table-level RLS which joins through projects.

criteria_results.evidence: validateProjectForm returns no errors for valid name + future date. 13 unit tests cover all form validation branches. Server action re-validates before insert.
Empty/whitespace name returns 'Project name is required'. hasBlockingErrors() gates server submission.
Past date produces warning (not error). pastDateConfirmed checkbox gates submission. Server action respects the flag.
app/page.tsx: unauthenticated → /login, no project / status=setup → /setup, active → /briefing. Smoke test confirmed 307 → /login in production.
readDraftField lazy initializers restore name/address/start_date from localStorage. clearDraft() called on successful submit. 5 unit tests cover write/read/clear/malformed JSON.
summarizeTemplate produces stage_count, task_count, sample_tasks for list display. 3 seeded templates (Timber Frame, Slab-on-Grade, ICF Two-Storey) loaded server-side.
summarizeTemplate returns stage summaries with sample_tasks capped at 3 per stage, total_duration_days, stage/task counts. Preview panel driven by this data.
buildTemplateInsertPlan creates cursor-based schedule (planned_start/planned_end per task, order_by_date per material). 12 unit tests verified. applyTemplate server action inserts all rows.

Server-side summarization keeps browser payload to summaries only (not raw JSONB). Performance test confirms summarizeTemplate is synchronous and sub-10ms for a 7-stage template. Live Lighthouse score requires browser run against authenticated session.
buildCustomizationTree groups tasks under stages by order_index. CustomizationScreen renders collapsible tree with per-task checkboxes. 7 unit tests cover ordering, empty stages, reversed input.

tasksWithBrokenDependencies correctly flags direct-dep tasks when upstream is toggled off. UI wired with ⚠ icon. Dormant until template-apply writes task_dependencies rows — no dep rows exist yet. Code path verified, UI tested, unit tests pass.

suggestFromMessage() implemented as keyword matcher (ICF/insulation/solar) behind stable interface. Real LLM swap is a one-function body replacement. UI accept/reject flow fully exercised. Keyword quality is the env limitation, not the interface.
applySuggestion() merges toggle_off and add_task changes into draft state. Accept marks suggestion applied; reject marks dismissed. 3 unit tests + integration with full draft state.
finalizeProject verifies ≥1 stage + ≥1 task, sets project.status=active, revalidates, redirects to /briefing. Contract spec test confirms business rule conditions.
validateStageInput enforces name max 80 chars, valid hex color. 6-swatch color picker in StageManager with aria-pressed. 6 unit tests.

reorderStages pure function handles head→tail, tail→head, middle, noop, clamping, unknown id, non-mutation. Up/down arrow buttons are accessible fallback. 9 unit tests. reorderProjectStages persists via two-phase update.
buildDeleteWarning returns requiresConfirmation=true + message quoting task count for non-empty stages. 3 unit tests incl. pluralization. Server action gated by confirmed=true.
deleteStage(confirmed=false) on a stage with 0 tasks proceeds without dialog. Server independently re-counts tasks — confirmed=false + taskCount>0 returns requiresConfirmation without deleting.
validateTaskInput enforces name max 120, duration_days positive integer, no duplicate dep ids. 8 unit tests.
computePlannedDates: planned_end = planned_start + (duration-1). Inclusive-day semantics. 1-day task has start=end. 3 unit tests.
computePlannedDates with empty dependencies array → planned_start = project.start_date. 1 unit test.
computePlannedDates with deps → planned_start = max(dep.planned_end) + 1 day. Multi-dep and month-boundary cases tested. 3 unit tests.

updateTaskDuration calls cascade_task_dates() RPC with new planned_end = start + (duration-1). Pure date math verified by 3 unit tests. SQL cascade (recursive CTE updating downstream tasks + materials) not integration-tested against live DB.
removeFromDependencies() removes rows where depends_on_task_id=deleted task. DB cascade (ON DELETE CASCADE) handles both FK columns atomically. 2 unit tests.
validateTradeInput enforces name required (max 120), optional specialty/phone/email, email format validation. 7 unit tests.
assignTradeToTask verifies trade belongs to same project as task. TaskTradeAssigner optimistic <select> with server rollback. Ownership contract test confirms cross-project assignment blocked.

formatTelHref strips non-digits, preserves leading +, returns null for empty/no-digits. tel: href constructed correctly per RFC 3966. 5 unit tests covering Irish mobile/landline, international +353, US (555) formats. Actual tap-to-call dispatch requires real mobile device.

buildTradeDeleteWarning(name, taskCount) returns requiresConfirmation + message for N>0, no-op for N=0. Server recounts independently before nulling task.trade_id and deleting trade. 3 unit tests incl. pluralization.
